Want to work with international clients, grow fast, and build a real global career from anywhere?

Dynime is expanding and we’re looking for ambitious people who know how to communicate, sell, build relationships, and drive growth.

Why join us

You'll shape how a 20+ person global team scales — with autonomy, ownership, and direct impact on revenue.

careers.content_html:
About the role

As CTO you own the long-term technical strategy for Dynime — selecting the right stack, hiring senior engineers, hardening security, and shipping a scalable SaaS platform alongside our client services delivery.

What you'll do

  • Set the engineering vision, architecture and roadmap
  • Hire, mentor and lead a remote engineering team
  • Own code quality, security, performance and DevOps maturity
  • Partner with COO, Product and Sales on revenue-driving features
  • Lead technical due-diligence for investors and enterprise customers

What we're looking for

  • 10+ years building production SaaS / web platforms
  • 5+ years leading engineering teams as VP Eng / CTO / Head of Eng
  • Deep React, Node.js, Postgres and cloud experience (Supabase / AWS / GCP)
  • Strong product instincts and executive communication

job_applications.cover_letter:
Hi,

I'm applying for the WordPress / Shopify Developer role. Two upfront notes before I make the case:

1. I have 2 months of full-time experience, not 3 years. I'm applying because the rest of what you listed is close to my core work, and I'd rather make the case directly than pad a resume.
2. My depth is Shopify, not WordPress — the JD says "WordPress and/or Shopify," so I'm responding to that opening.

**On the four "what you'll do" points:**

Building custom Shopify storefronts is my weekly work. Four live production sites I've shipped: eienhealth.com (full health & wellness storefront), aquame.com, madeforus.net, and brightlinkav.com. Full portfolio at mtahir.netlify.app.

Liquid and JS are my core stack — Liquid 2.0, Online Store 2.0 architecture, Shopify CLI 3.0, Dawn customization, custom sections with merchant-editable schemas. On PHP: I haven't written production PHP, but I'm comfortable in template-driven languages (Liquid is structurally similar) and would ramp quickly on the WordPress side.

App integrations and payment gateways — comfortable with Shopify metafields, app blocks, and theme-level integrations.

Optimizing for speed, SEO, and conversions — Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) is a daily concern: critical CSS inlining, deferred JS, responsive image srcsets, schema markup, on-page SEO basics. Several of my live stores were performance-tuned at the section level, not bolted on at the end.

**On the "3+ years" and "design fidelity":**

For years, I'm 2.5 years short on paper. What I can offer instead: four production storefronts in the last few months, full-time Shopify experience at a Toronto-based remote team (Muscled Inc.), and a portfolio that shows Figma-to-Liquid fidelity I'd be happy to defend on a call. If the role can flex to a strong junior who carries Shopify production work end-to-end, I'd like to be considered. If it strictly needs three years across both stacks on day one, I understand.

One practical question: is the hybrid setup based in a specific city? I'm in Faisalabad — happy to relocate or commute if the studio is in Lahore or Islamabad, but want to confirm before we both invest time.

**Links:**
• Portfolio: mtahir.netlify.app
• GitHub: github.com/tahir1096
• LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/muhammadtahir1096

Résumé attached. Happy to do a short technical task on Liquid or a section build if it would help you assess fit beyond years on paper.

Thanks for reading,
Muhammad Tahir
Faisalabad, PK | +92 306 1001040

I’m a Full-Stack Software Engineer with hands-on production experience building scalable MERN-stack applications, including ERP systems, SaaS platforms, e-commerce solutions, and real-time web applications.

I’m excited about the opportunity to contribute my full-stack expertise, cloud deployment experience, and strong execution mindset to your engineering team.

Right now I’m working as a Founding Software Engineer where I handle both frontend and backend work, ship features, work on APIs, deployments, integrations, and pretty much everything needed to get products running properly in production.

What interested me in this role is that you’re looking for someone who can actually build and ship things end to end instead of just working on one small part. That’s the type of work I enjoy the most. I like moving fast, solving problems, improving systems, and building products that people actually use daily.

I’m also comfortable with CI/CD, cloud environments, GitHub workflows, and working with teams on product decisions and implementation. I care more about building real working products than just writing fancy code.

I think I’d be a strong fit for the role because my experience matches the stack you’re using, and I can contribute from day one without needing much hand holding.

job_applications.cover_letter:
I'm currently in my 6th semester at FAST-NUCES and I won't pretend I have years of work experience, but I've spent the last couple of years building real full-stack applications that go beyond typical university projects.
The one most relevant here is Fynder, a platform I built to solve a real problem at my university: students struggling to find FYP teammates. It's a full MERN stack app with real-time chat, a compatibility scoring engine, JWT auth, and AI-assisted features, deployed on Vercel. I made architectural decisions on it like using Hexagonal architecture to keep the business logic clean and testable, not because it was required, but because it was the right call.
I'm comfortable jumping between React components and backend APIs, thinking about database schemas, and caring about how the end product actually feels to use. I pick things up fast and I take code quality seriously.
I know the listing says 3+ years of experience. I don't have that on paper, but I think the work shows where I'm at. I'd love the chance to prove that.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Hi,

I'm applying for the Frontend Developer role. I'll be upfront on the obvious gap: I have 2 months of full-time experience, not 3 years. Want to make the case for a conversation anyway, because the rest of what you listed lines up closely with what I do every day.

**On the four "what you'll do" points:**

Pixel-perfect Figma-to-code is the bulk of my current work. I've shipped four live production storefronts — eienhealth.com, aquame.com, madeforus.net, brightlinkav.com — each built from Figma designs into responsive Liquid/CSS without compromise on spacing, type, or breakpoints. My personal site (mtahir.netlify.app) is Next.js + Tailwind and follows the same standard.

Performance and accessibility — Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, INP) is a daily concern for me. Critical CSS inlining, deferred JS, responsive image srcsets, font preloading, lazy-loading below the fold. On accessibility, I'm honest that I haven't owned formal a11y audits in production, but I'm fluent in the fundamentals — semantic HTML, keyboard navigation, alt text, contrast, focus states — and would close that gap quickly inside a team that prioritizes it.

Reusable components and tests — Shopify section architecture is essentially this pattern: small, configurable, composable blocks with merchant-editable schemas. Translating that mental model to React component libraries is a short step, not a long one.

Collaborating with backend on APIs — working knowledge of Node.js + Express + REST + MongoDB on the side, used during full-stack tasks at Muscled Inc.

**On the "3+ years React + TypeScript":**

My React and TypeScript exposure is real but not the depth you're asking for. What I can offer instead: strong fundamentals in JavaScript and modern frontend, a track record of shipping polished work on tight timelines, and a portfolio that proves I take pixel-level execution seriously. If the team has room for a junior who can carry frontend production work end-to-end and grow into the React/TS senior role over the next year, I'd like to be considered. If the role strictly needs a senior on day one, I understand — no hard feelings.

**Links:**
• Portfolio: mtahir.netlify.app
• GitHub: github.com/tahir1096
• LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/muhammadtahir1096

Résumé attached. Happy to do a short technical task or take-home if it would help you assess fit beyond years on paper.

Thanks for reading,
Muhammad Tahir
Faisalabad, PK | PKT (UTC+5)

job_applications.cover_letter:
Hi Dynime Team,

Most job posts say they’re looking for someone who can “build scalable products.” Very few teams actually care about the thinking behind them.

That’s the part I enjoy most.

I’m a Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience building AI-powered web applications, SaaS-style platforms, and production-ready systems using React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, APIs, and modern deployment workflows. Recently, I built a full RAG-based legal assistant platform from scratch, worked on scalable workflow automation systems with OpenAI integrations, and developed modern frontend-heavy applications focused on usability just as much as functionality.

What pulls me toward Dynime is the product-first mindset. I like building things that real businesses actually use, improve, and depend on over time instead of just shipping features for the sake of it.

I’m someone who learns fast, adapts quickly, and genuinely enjoys solving messy engineering problems. Whether it’s frontend architecture, backend APIs, AI integrations, database design, or deployment, I like owning the process end-to-end.

Would love the chance to contribute and grow with your team.

Best regards,
Ali Abdullah

I am writing to apply for the QA Engineer . With over two years of experience in manual testing for web and mobile applications, I am confident that my skills in functional, regression, API, and UAT testing will bring immediate value to your team.

At A Tech Site LLC, I have been responsible for end-to-end manual testing of SaaS and FinTech applications, including workflow validation, UI testing, role-based permissions, and data accuracy. I use JIRA and ClickUp for defect tracking, Postman for API validation, and SQL queries for backend data verification. My detailed bug reports and clear reproduction steps have helped development teams resolve issues faster.

Previously at Saro Shop, I executed over 80 test cases per cycle, performed cross-browser and mobile testing, and collaborated closely with developers in Agile sprints to ensure high-quality releases.

I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to [Company Name]'s success. I am available for an interview at your earliest convenience and look forward to discussing how my QA experience aligns with your needs.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Zain Khan

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager, 
I am writing to express my keen interest in the position advertised at your esteemed organization. As a Full 
Stack Developer with over two years of experience in building high-performance web applications using the 
MERN stack and modern JavaScript frameworks, I am confident in my ability to contribute effectively to your 
development team and help deliver scalable, user-centric solutions. 
In my current role at Altaurux, I have led the development of production-ready applications using Next.js, React.js, Node.js, and Tailwind CSS. I’ve engineered real-time features with WebSockets, integrated secure payment gateways like Stripe and Revolut, and deployed applications using CI/CD pipelines on DigitalOcean and Heroku. My contributions have improved database query performance by 30% and reduced deployment times by 40%. I’m passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and delivering software that drives real business value. 
Beyond my technical skills, I bring a collaborative mindset and agile experience, having worked closely with cross-functional teams, designers, and product managers to ensure alignment and timely delivery. My work on platforms like Model Haus, Swoopseats, and Safra Travel demonstrates my ability to lead full-stack 
initiatives from architecture to deployment, always prioritizing performance, security, and user experience. 
I would welcome the opportunity to further discuss how my background and skills align with your 
organization’s goals. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of 
contributing to your innovative projects. 
Sincerely, 
Muhammad Ali

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am a CS student about to graduate with close to three years of hands on experience across freelance work and full time roles. I am applying for the Full Stack Developer position at Dynime and I believe the work I have shipped makes me a strong fit.

A good chunk of that experience has come from freelancing, where I worked with different clients and tech stacks, figured things out independently, and delivered without much hand holding. More recently I have been working full time at Benji as an AI Automation Engineer and before that at BedsChain as a Full Stack Developer. That mix of freelance and product work has made me comfortable owning features end to end.

On the frontend I work with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. On the backend I use Node, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL, designing APIs, handling auth, and managing deployments through GitHub Actions CI/CD on Azure and Vercel.

At Benji I built LLM powered automation workflows and integrated AI agents into production backend systems. At BedsChain I worked on an internal booking platform handling real time availability, secure auth, and reservation workflows. My event driven microservices project covers async patterns, PostgreSQL schema design, and containerised deployments with Docker.

I write clean, tested code, collaborate well with design and product, and take real ownership of what I build.

muneebhassan.me — github.com/muneebxhasan

Thank you for your time.

Muneeb Hassan

job_applications.cover_letter:
Because I don't just write code, I solve problems. At 1337 Coding School, there are no teachers, no lectures, no hand-holding. Every project, every challenge, every line of code was figured out through persistence, research, and collaboration. That environment forged something that cannot be taught in a classroom: the ability to take full ownership of a problem, break it down, and deliver — no matter the complexity.

Technically, I bring a rare and versatile profile:

• Full-stack engineering — Python, Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, Docker, microservices architecture, CI/CD pipelines, Linux
• Machine Learning & AI — PyTorch, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Computer Vision, NLP
• Applied AI research — I recently completed an internship at UM6P's College of Computing, where I built end-to-end LLM and RAG pipelines to extract and structure scientific data for battery material synthesis optimization
• Frontend — React.js, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, REST API integration, responsive design

Some highlights that speak louder than a list of skills:

• Co-built a custom HTTP server in C++ handling 1,000 simultaneous connections with a 99.5% request success rate
• Designed and deployed a full-scale multiplayer web platform using Django, PostgreSQL, and a microservices architecture
• Built automated AI pipelines combining RAG and Large Language Models to process and structure real scientific research data

I am fast, I am curious, and I take full ownership of what I deliver. I thrive in environments where the bar is high and the work is meaningful. I don't need to be told twice, I need to be given the opportunity once.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my background fits your team's needs. I have attached my resume and am happy to share my GitHub portfolio or any additional details.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am writing to express my strong interest in the Frontend Developer role at your
organization. With two + years of professional experience as a Frontend Developer, I have built and shipped responsive, high-performance web
applications across ERP systems, healthcare platforms, recruitment tools, and
streaming services. My expertise in React.js, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, and
GSAP animations, combined with a passion for clean, scalable code and pixel- perfect UI implementation, makes me an ideal candidate to contribute immediately to
your engineering team.
In my current role as Associate Frontend Developer at Red Star Technologies, I
lead frontend development for multiple client projects using Next.js and Redux Toolkit, collaborate directly with backend engineers on REST API integration, and deliver
animated, high-fidelity components with GSAP. Prior to this, at Alright Tech, I built
React.js interfaces with Redux Toolkit and established shared component patterns
using Tailwind CSS and MUI, reducing styling inconsistencies across the team. My portfolio demonstrates end-to-end frontend ownership and full-stack capability. For Owners' Inventory, an ERP and inventory management system, I built the
complete frontend with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, designed RESTful
APIs with Node.js and Express.js, integrated MongoDB for real-time data
management, and introduced GSAP-powered micro-interactions that improved
perceived responsiveness on data-heavy screens. For KolabMe, a healthcare
appointment platform, I delivered a 30+ reusable component library in React.js and
TypeScript, reducing UI development time by approximately 40%, while prioritizing
accessibility for non-technical healthcare users. I also architected the Lumina Talent
Advisory recruitment dashboard in Next.js, integrated real-time data APIs for live
application status updates, and built YouStream, a video streaming platform with
Redux-managed authentication and dark/light theme switching. Additionally, I
contributed to the Red Star Technologies corporate website using Laravel Blade
and SCSS, achieving SEO-friendly, responsive layouts with GSAP scroll animations
to increase engagement on conversion pages. Beyond technical execution, I thrive in collaborative, agile teams and am passionate
about performance optimisation, accessibility, and maintainable code. I actively use
modern AI tooling (ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, DeepSeek) to accelerate development
without sacrificing quality, and I am equally comfortable working in Linux
environments, Git, and Postman.
I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my experience with scalable
frontend architectures, animated user interfaces, and full-stack integration can help
your team deliver exceptional web experiences. Thank you for your time and
consideration. 
Sincerely, 
Haider Ali
Frontend Developer

Note: Please note that my work links have also been added to my resume for your reference.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I’m excited to apply for the Full Stack Developer role. While my resume reflects two years of formal experience, the reality is that I’ve been building, breaking, and fixing software for much longer.

I started coding around seven years ago, long before I had a professional title attached to it. That journey included rebuilding a hacked e commerce site for a family friend, learning hard lessons from failed late night deployments, and helping teammates solve problems when deadlines were tight and stress was high. Those experiences may not appear on a timesheet, but they shaped the way I approach development and teamwork.

Over time, I’ve worked on shipping features, debugging memory leaks, improving slow SQL queries that affected live systems, and collaborating closely with QA to make sure products work smoothly for real users. I’ve learned that good software is not just about writing code. It is about problem solving, communication, ownership, and staying calm when things go wrong.

That mindset is what I bring to every project and every team I work with. I’m always willing to learn, adapt, and put in the effort needed to deliver meaningful results.

I would love the opportunity to contribute my skills and experience to your team. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Warm regards,
Hamza Sarwar

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Recruiter,  
I am writing to express my interest in the Full Stack Developer position at Dynime. With over 2 years of professional experience, I have developed and maintained production-level solutions used across the U.S. and Canada, building scalable and reliable web applications using .Net, JavaScript, React.js, Angular, C#, SQL/NoSQL databases, and APIs. I also have experience working with GLS US. 
At SkilledHat, a U.S.-based firm, I contributed to the development and optimization of complex web applications using ASP.NET Core JavaScript, React, and Angular. Working within a distributed Agile team, I delivered production-ready solutions aligned with quality standards and project timelines. Under SkilledHat, I am currently working with GLS US on the production and development of their web applications. In addition, I developed a cross-platform mobile application using React Native, further expanding the product’s reach. Previously, during my internship at KaiRiz Cyber Technologies, I built single-page applications and implemented authentication-based login systems, for which I received a certificate of excellence in recognition of my contributions.
In addition to my technical experience, I served as a Technical Lead at GDSC Air University, where I led a team and organized technical workshops to promote collaboration and practical learning. This role strengthened my leadership and communication skills, and further reinforced my commitment to mentorship and solving real-world problems through technology.
Relocation is not an issue if selected for the role, and I’m fully prepared to adapt to the specific needs of the position. 
With a strong foundation in web development and a keen ability to work collaboratively and innovate, I am confident that I would be an amazing asset to Dynime I look forward to discussing how my skills and passion can contribute to the continued success of your team.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Hi Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Full-Stack Developer position. While I have two highly concentrated years of professional experience, my daily work is entirely focused on shipping production code using the exact stack you rely on: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, and Supabase. I thrive in environments where I can take complete ownership of features end-to-end—from designing scalable database schemas to writing performant APIs and deploying reliably to the cloud.

My recent project work directly aligns with your need for a developer with a strong product mindset who can build and ship features across the stack:

Zonic (Business Automation Platform) - Live Demo: zonicapp.com: I engineered this full-stack application end-to-end, utilizing Next.js for the frontend and NestJS with Supabase for the backend. To handle complex messaging workflows and AI-powered scheduling, I designed a queue-based architecture using BullMQ and Redis, ensuring reliable asynchronous processing in production.

Tetrad Pay & Vaulex - Live Demo: tetradpay.com: I architected the backend for a digital wallet and transaction monitoring system. This required deep expertise in database design, advanced PostgreSQL query optimization, and writing clean, tested code to handle secure, real-time fund transfers at scale.

I am highly comfortable operating within Agile sprints, utilizing Gitflow, Docker, and GCP to maintain seamless CI/CD pipelines. Working closely with cross-functional requirements has ingrained the importance of daily collaboration, rigorous code reviews, and designing architectures that prioritize user experience and product goals.

I am eager to bring my momentum and deep familiarity with the React and Node/Edge ecosystem to your team. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can immediately contribute to your engineering goals and ship impactful features.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Because I don't just write code — I solve problems. At 1337 Coding School, there are no teachers, no lectures, no hand-holding. Every project, every challenge, every line of code was figured out through persistence, research, and collaboration. That environment forged something that cannot be taught in a classroom: the ability to take full ownership of a problem, break it down, and deliver — no matter the complexity.

Technically, I bring a rare and versatile profile:

• Full-stack engineering — Python, Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, Docker, microservices architecture, CI/CD pipelines, Linux
• Machine Learning & AI — PyTorch, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, Computer Vision, NLP
• Applied AI research — I recently completed an internship at UM6P's College of Computing, where I built end-to-end LLM and RAG pipelines to extract and structure scientific data for battery material synthesis optimization
• Frontend — React.js, Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, REST API integration, responsive design

Some highlights that speak louder than a list of skills:

• Co-built a custom HTTP server in C++ handling 1,000 simultaneous connections with a 99.5% request success rate
• Designed and deployed a full-scale multiplayer web platform using Django, PostgreSQL, and a microservices architecture
• Built automated AI pipelines combining RAG and Large Language Models to process and structure real scientific research data

I am fast, I am curious, and I take full ownership of what I deliver. I thrive in environments where the bar is high and the work is meaningful. I don't need to be told twice — I need to be given the opportunity once.

I would welcome the chance to discuss how my background fits your team's needs. I have attached my resume and am happy to share my GitHub portfolio or any additional details.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my interest in the Full Stack Developer position at Dynime.

I am a Full Stack Developer with hands-on experience in building modern web applications using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and REST APIs. I have developed responsive user interfaces, integrated backend services, and worked with databases to create scalable and efficient solutions.

My technical skills include:

- Frontend: React.js, Next.js, HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs
- Databases: MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL
- Tools: Git, GitHub, Postman, Docker (basic)

I am passionate about developing SaaS products, writing clean and maintainable code, and solving real-world problems. I enjoy working across both frontend and backend and continuously learning new technologies to improve product performance and user experience.

I believe my skill set and enthusiasm for building scalable web applications make me a strong fit for Dynime’s engineering team. I would welcome the opportunity to contribute to your products and grow alongside your talented team.

Please find my resume attached for your consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Moiz Khatri
Karachi, Pakistan

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Senior Frontend Developer position. With over six years of professional experience in software development, specializing in React.js, Next.js, React Native, TypeScript, and modern frontend technologies, I am confident in my ability to contribute effectively to your team.

Throughout my career, I have built scalable, high-performance web and mobile applications with a strong focus on user experience, performance optimization, and clean architecture. I have extensive hands-on experience developing complex frontend systems using React.js and Next.js, creating responsive and highly interactive user interfaces, optimizing application performance, and implementing reusable component-driven architectures.

In addition to frontend expertise, I have significant experience in React Native, where I have developed cross-platform mobile applications with seamless user experiences across Android and iOS platforms. My work includes API integrations, real-time functionality, state management, push notifications, analytics integration, crash reporting, and app deployment processes.

I am also experienced with backend and full-stack technologies including Node.js, Express.js, GraphQL, Firebase, Supabase, and SQL/NoSQL databases, enabling me to collaborate effectively across the entire development lifecycle. Furthermore, I have worked extensively with cloud and DevOps technologies such as AWS, Azure, CI/CD pipelines, Storybook, Monorepo architecture, and multilingual application support.

As a Senior Frontend Developer, I bring not only strong technical expertise but also problem-solving abilities, collaboration skills, and experience working in fast-paced agile environments. I am passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and building products that deliver exceptional user experiences.

I would welcome the opportunity to further discuss how my background and expertise can contribute to your team’s success. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you.

Sincerely,
Abdul Basit

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am Razi Ullah, a full-stack software engineer with experience across React/Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js/NestJS, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Prisma, CI/CD, and production integrations. I am interested in this role because it closely aligns with the stack I currently work with and the type of product-focused engineering I enjoy.

In my current role as an Associate Software Engineer at TechClan, I work on production React-based applications serving 100k+ users. My work includes shipping full-stack features and bug fixes, working with Temporal workflows, integrating Hubstaff timer functionality, implementing Datadog tracing, adding Mixpanel backend events, and handling frontend analytics. I also contribute to YAML CI/CD pipelines, write unit tests, review pull requests, resolve merge conflicts, debug production issues, and collaborate closely with product and design teams.

Beyond my professional role, I built DailyFit, a multi-tenant gym management SaaS using Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, NextAuth, and Docker. This gave me deeper hands-on experience with tenant-scoped data access, onboarding flows, product thinking, and deployment.

Although my formal professional experience is around one year, it has been production-heavy and closely aligned with the expectations of this role. I care about clean, typed, tested code, fast iteration, and owning features from idea to release. I would be excited to bring this mindset and technical experience to your React + Node/Postgres stack.

Sincerely,  
Razi Ullah

I hold a Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering and continue to improve my skills through real-world projects. I am ready to contribute and add value from day one.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
M. Muneeb Shahid

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am writing to express my interest in the Full Stack Engineer position at your
organisation. I have over 3 years of experience in designing and developing scalable
web applications using the MERN stack, along with Python-based backend
systems. My expertise includes building secure, high-performance applications
with RESTful APIs, authentication systems (JWT, OAuth2, RBAC), and modern
frontend frameworks such as React and Next.js. In addition to full-stack
development, I have strong experience in building AI-powered systems, including
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, LLM integrations (Mistral,
Hugging Face), semantic search, and vector database solutions such as Qdrant. I
have worked on real-world projects involving intelligent chatbots, real-time data
systems, and personalised recommendation engines.
I also have hands-on experience in deploying applications on AWS using Docker
and CI/CD pipelines, ensuring scalability, reliability, and efficient production
delivery. My work often focuses on performance optimisation, caching strategies
(Redis), and designing modular, maintainable system architectures. I am confident
in my ability to contribute to both frontend and backend development while also
bringing value in AI-driven features and cloud-based deployments. I am highly
motivated to work in collaborative environments where I can solve complex
engineering problems and build impactful products.
Thank you for considering my application. I would welcome the opportunity to
further discuss how my skills and experience align with your team’s goals.
Sincerely,
Danish Ali

job_applications.cover_letter:
Hi,

I'm writing to apply for the Frontend Developer position. With 3+ years of experience shipping production code across React, Node, and PostgreSQL, I'm confident I can contribute meaningfully from day one.

At Alfabolt, I work end-to-end on products used daily — building React Native and Next.js frontends, designing Django REST APIs, and managing PostgreSQL databases on AWS. A few highlights that map directly to what you're looking for:

- Built and maintained full-stack applications for clients across multiple countries, including a food services platform (React Native + Django + PostgreSQL) and a SaaS security product with OAuth integrations.
- Designed APIs and database schemas from scratch, including a multi-tenant barber booking platform with subscription tiers and a legal tech tool integrating LLM-powered report generation.
- Managed CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure on AWS — handling EC2 deployments, RDS optimization (reduced a client's database costs from ~$725/mo to ~$28/mo), Nginx, SSL, and monitoring with CloudWatch.
- Collaborated closely with product owners and designers on a daily basis, iterating on features based on user feedback and business requirements.

I also run Elephantfly, a digital agency where I lead technical delivery for SME clients — which has sharpened my product mindset and ability to make pragmatic engineering decisions that balance quality with speed.

While my recent stack leans Django on the backend, I've worked with Node.js and TypeScript, and the patterns — RESTful API design, relational data modeling, component-driven frontends, testing, and cloud deployment — translate directly. I pick up tools fast and care most about shipping clean, well-tested code that solves real problems for users.

I'd love to chat about how I can contribute to your team. Happy to share code samples or walk through any of the projects mentioned above.

Best regards,
Ahmed Hashir

job_applications.cover_letter:
Subject: Full Stack Engineer Application – Ahmed

Hi,

I'm writing to apply for the Full Stack Engineer position. With 3+ years of experience shipping production code across React, Node, and PostgreSQL, I'm confident I can contribute meaningfully from day one.

At Alfabolt, I work end-to-end on products used daily — building React Native and Next.js frontends, designing Django REST APIs, and managing PostgreSQL databases on AWS. A few highlights that map directly to what you're looking for:

- Built and maintained full-stack applications for clients across multiple countries, including a food services platform (React Native + Django + PostgreSQL) and a SaaS security product with OAuth integrations.
- Designed APIs and database schemas from scratch, including a multi-tenant barber booking platform with subscription tiers and a legal tech tool integrating LLM-powered report generation.
- Managed CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure on AWS — handling EC2 deployments, RDS optimization (reduced a client's database costs from ~$725/mo to ~$28/mo), Nginx, SSL, and monitoring with CloudWatch.
- Collaborated closely with product owners and designers on a daily basis, iterating on features based on user feedback and business requirements.

While my recent stack leans Django on the backend, I've worked with Node.js and TypeScript, and the patterns — RESTful API design, relational data modeling, component-driven frontends, testing, and cloud deployment — translate directly. I pick up tools fast and care most about shipping clean, well-tested code that solves real problems for users.

I'd love to chat about how I can contribute to your team. Happy to share code samples or walk through any of the projects mentioned above.

Best regards,
Ahmed

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am a Computer Science graduate from Iqra University (CGPA: 3.75) with hands-on experience in building scalable backend systems, REST APIs, and data-driven applications.

I have worked as a Full Stack Developer at Sxentra, where I develop and maintain backend systems for an order and payment management platform using Node.js, Express, and MySQL. My work includes implementing APIs for order processing, payment tracking, transaction management, and admin approval workflows, along with designing efficient database structures and features such as receipt generation and payment history.

In addition to my professional experience, I have developed several projects that highlight my problem-solving and technical skills. I built a Medicine Demand Forecasting System using Flask, React, and Neural Prophet to predict demand based on sales and weather data. I also developed a Gold Price Prediction model using economic indicators and a backend-focused Backlink Management System using Node.js and Express.

I am particularly interested in roles where I can contribute to building scalable systems, improve backend performance, and work on real-world engineering challenges. I am eager to continue learning and applying my skills in a collaborative and growth-oriented environment.I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how my background and skills can contribute to your team. Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Muhammad Yawar

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am applying for the Performance Marketer position. After reading the role description, one line stood out — "Own paid media end-to-end." That is exactly how I have always worked.
I do not manage campaigns from a distance. I write the briefs, set the bids, test the creatives, read the data, and optimize until the numbers move. Over 6+ years, this hands-on approach has delivered results that I am genuinely proud of —
At Sprihaware, I built and managed the complete paid media operation from scratch — Pixel setup, Conversion API integration, audience building, creative testing, and retargeting — delivering a 14x ROAS on a $300/month budget. Every taka spent came back fourteen times over.
At Solus Corporation, I owned paid acquisition across Meta and Google while simultaneously managing organic — scaling monthly revenue from BDT 5L to 30L in under 12 months. I tracked performance through GA4, GTM, and custom attribution — making budget and bidding decisions based on data, not intuition.
What I bring to this role specifically —

Creative briefing to campaign launch: I have directed full creative production — video, photography, ad copy — and translated that into campaigns built around conversion, not just clicks
CAC & ROAS optimization: I have consistently reduced cost-per-acquisition through retargeting precision and creative iteration — bringing cost-per-sale below $1 at Sprihaware through server-side tracking
Budget management: Managed monthly ad budgets across multiple campaigns simultaneously — always accountable to clear performance targets
Reporting: Delivered weekly performance reports to management with clear insight on what is working, what is not, and what changes I am making

I am comfortable with Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, GA4, and GTM at a hands-on level. I am also honest — I do not have SQL experience, but I am analytically strong and learn fast. My decisions have always been data-driven, even without advanced database querying.
I would love the opportunity to bring this performance-first mindset to your team.
Best regards,
Abir Imtiaj
+8801624657444
abeerimtiaj@gmail.com

job_applications.cover_letter:
I believe I’m a strong fit for this role because my experience goes beyond only development — I’ve been leading teams, managing projects, improving workflows, and coordinating cross-functional operations in real production environments for several years.

Currently, I work as a Project Manager where I manage project planning, task distribution, delivery timelines, team coordination, and client communication alongside hands-on technical leadership. I’ve worked on large SaaS platforms, ERP systems, and multi-tenant applications where maintaining organized processes, clear reporting, and smooth collaboration across developers, designers, QA, and stakeholders was critical.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,
I am writing to express my interest in the Full Stack Engineer position at Dynime. With over three years of experience delivering production-grade web applications across Fintech and SaaS domains, I bring both the technical depth and the execution discipline that enterprise engineering teams demand.
In my current role at Bashin Technologies, I architect Microservices-based backend systems handling real-time financial transactions across distributed databases in the UAE and KSA. Previously, as the sole backend developer on EarlyPay — a PCI-compliant Earned Wage Access platform — I independently integrated multi-bank linking, AI-driven credit risk scoring, and automated payroll deduction logic from the ground up.
What drives me is building systems that are not just functional, but reliable at scale. Whether it is designing secure payment gateway flows, synchronizing large datasets through Google Ads API, or managing high-concurrency APIs with Redis and ClickHouse — I take ownership of the full delivery, not just my slice of it.
I would welcome the opportunity to bring that same standard to Dynime and contribute to your engineering goals.
Yours sincerely,
Zubair Rafiq

job_applications.cover_letter:
Hi Hiring Team,
I am writing to apply for the Senior Frontend Developer position. With over 5 years of experience in frontend and full-stack development, I have strong hands-on expertise in building modern, scalable, and responsive web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Redux, React Query, Tailwind CSS, Material UI, REST APIs, and GraphQL.
I believe I would be a great fit for this role because I have worked on several real-world products where frontend quality, performance, maintainability, and user experience were very important. My experience includes building complex dashboards, healthcare platforms, CRM systems, real-time chat features, AI-based tools, mobile apps, and marketplace platforms.
Some of the projects and products I have worked on include:
Immersive Fox
Worked on AI-driven video generation features and frontend interfaces for creating personalized business videos.
Instantly AI
Contributed to frontend-related work for a SaaS platform, focusing on clean UI, usability, and scalable frontend implementation.
ReadyHubb
Worked on a marketplace platform connecting professionals with clients, using Next.js, TypeScript, and Nest.js. I contributed to building a high-performance frontend and improving the overall user experience.
360 HealthTek – Remote Patient Monitoring
Worked on healthcare and remote patient monitoring systems, including responsive dashboards, patient data interfaces, real-time communication features, Twilio integration, and healthcare workflow improvements.
Yourself Pilates Mobile App
Contributed to mobile app development and frontend/mobile UI implementation, focusing on smooth user experience and responsive design.
CNTXT
Worked on frontend development tasks involving modern UI implementation, API integration, and scalable application structure.
MDLBEAST
Worked on frontend features and UI implementation for a high-traffic entertainment/event-related platform, with focus on performance, responsiveness, and user experience.
My strongest area is building frontend applications with React and Next.js, while keeping the codebase clean, reusable, and easy to maintain. I am comfortable with component architecture, state management, API integrations, authentication flows, debugging, performance optimization, responsive design, and deployment. I have also worked closely with designers, backend teams, QA engineers, and non-technical stakeholders to convert business requirements and Figma designs into production-ready interfaces.
What makes me a strong candidate is that I do not only focus on writing code. I try to understand the user flow, business requirement, and technical constraints before implementing a solution. This helps me build frontend solutions that are not only visually accurate but also reliable, scalable, and user-friendly.
I would be excited to bring my frontend expertise, problem-solving skills, and ownership mindset to your team. I am confident that my experience with React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, modern UI development, and real-world project delivery makes me a great fit for the Senior Frontend Developer position.
Best regards,
Nauman Ijaz

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the Frontend Developer position.

I have completed my Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering and currently have over 2 years of hands-on experience in frontend development, specializing in React.js, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, and responsive web application development.

In my current role, I develop reusable UI components, integrate REST APIs, and build scalable and user-friendly interfaces with a strong focus on clean code, performance, responsiveness, and visual consistency. I also have working knowledge of TypeScript and Next.js and continuously improve my understanding of modern frontend best practices, accessibility, and performance optimization.

I am particularly interested in this opportunity because of the emphasis on polished UI implementation, reusable component architecture, and collaboration in a product-focused environment. I enjoy transforming Figma designs into responsive, pixel-perfect interfaces while ensuring smooth user experiences across devices and browsers.

I am confident that my technical skills, UI attention to detail, and passion for frontend engineering would allow me to contribute effectively to your team.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss my application further.

Sincerely,

Immad Naseer

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my enthusiasm for the Client Success / Account Coordinator role at Dynime. With over a year of direct client-facing research and coordination experience, a strong foundation in CRM workflows, and a proven record of improving team operational efficiency, I believe I can make an immediate and meaningful contribution to your Customer Success function.

In my most recent role as a Junior Technical Research Analyst at ALXICORN, I worked closely with cross-functional stakeholders to coordinate deliverables, synthesize complex data from 15+ platforms into actionable reports, and maintain structured documentation across the team. I built SOPs from scratch, streamlined onboarding processes that reduced new-hire ramp time by 15%, and consistently ensured that internal workflows stayed organized and on schedule — exactly the kind of coordination, follow-up, and accountability your role calls for.

Prior to that, at Business Globalizer, I was directly responsible for aggregating market intelligence from 10+ sources into a centralized database, improving data accessibility by 20% across the team. I also provided technical support to fintech end users, which elevated customer satisfaction scores by 30%. These experiences sharpened my written communication, issue resolution, and organizational skills — all of which are central to managing client accounts effectively.

I am comfortable working with CRM tools and productivity platforms (JIRA, ClickUp, Zapier), which gives me a practical head start in maintaining account notes, tracking client requests, and preparing accurate reports and summaries. I also bring strong written communication skills developed through creating PRDs, user journey documentation, and cross-functional process guides — so client-facing written updates and summaries would come naturally.

What draws me to Dynime specifically is your focus on building digital products that genuinely serve people. As someone who has spent the past year translating user pain points into structured product requirements, I appreciate organizations that put the client experience at the center of everything — and I am excited to be on the frontline of delivering that experience directly.

I am confident that my background in coordination, documentation, stakeholder communication, and CRM-adjacent tooling makes me a strong fit for this position. I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can support your team.

Warm regards,

Md. Yeamin Islam

yeamin.cse@gmail.com  ·  +880 1850-265506

Dear Hiring Manager,

I hope you are doing well.

I am writing to express my interest in the mentioned position of Sales at your company. With a Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) in Human Resource Management from BRAC University and experience in communication, coordination, administrative support, and client handling, I believe I can contribute effectively to your team.

Over the years, I have developed strong organizational and multitasking abilities through both academic and professional experiences. I have worked independently in tutoring and coordination roles, where communication, scheduling, record management, and maintaining professionalism were essential.


 I worked as a HR & Accounting Coordinator in a energy service based company along  with the experience of Working as an HR Intern in a automation company  , which strengthened my communication, time management, HR & Accounting software, and problem solving skills.

In addition, I am skilled in Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, Microsoft Word, PowerPoint, Canva, email communication, internet research, data entry, scheduling, and general administrative tasks. I am a quick learner, detail-oriented, adaptable, and comfortable managing multiple responsibilities in a remote work environment.

I am particularly interested in opportunities where I can use my communication and organizational skills while continuing to learn and grow professionally. I would appreciate the opportunity to further discuss how my background and skills align with your requirements.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward hearing from you.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the remote opportunity at Dynime. As a motivated and growth-driven individual, I am eager to contribute my communication skills, digital knowledge, and strong work ethic to a modern international company like yours.

Currently, I am pursuing a Bachelor’s degree in Psychology while also completing professional training in Digital Marketing. Through my academic background and practical learning, I have developed strong interpersonal communication, client engagement, problem-solving, and online marketing skills — all of which are valuable for lead generation, client relationship management, and business growth.

I am confident in working with global clients, learning new systems quickly, and adapting to fast-paced remote work environments. I am also familiar with AI tools, online communication platforms, social media marketing, and digital business strategies. My ability to learn fast, stay organized, and communicate professionally allows me to perform efficiently and contribute positively to team goals.

What makes Dynime especially appealing to me is your global vision, remote flexibility, and growth-focused environment. I am highly motivated to build a long-term career where I can continuously improve my skills while helping the company expand and succeed internationally.

I am ready to dedicate myself fully, take on responsibilities with confidence, and grow alongside your team. I would truly appreciate the opportunity to prove my abilities and become a valuable part of Dynime.

Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to the possibility of speaking with you further.

Sincerely,
Sayma Akter

job_applications.cover_letter:
I believe I would be a strong fit for this role due to my extensive experience in administrative support, HR coordination, and working with international remote teams. I have over 7 years of professional experience supporting operations, employee communication, coordination, and client-facing tasks in fast-paced remote environments.

I have worked with USA and UK-based organizations, which has helped me develop strong communication, teamwork, and cross-cultural collaboration skills. My IELTS Band 8.0 reflects my ability to communicate professionally and confidently in English with international clients and team members.

In addition, I have hands-on experience in recruitment coordination, onboarding support, HR documentation, scheduling, and team management processes. I am also familiar with a variety of modern remote work tools including ClickUp, Manatal, Apploye, Calendly, Guesty, Google Workspace, and other productivity platforms.

Academically, I hold an MBA from the University of Dhaka with a CGPA of 3.78, which has strengthened my understanding of business operations, management, and organizational growth.

I am highly organized, adaptable, motivated, and eager to contribute to a growth-focused international team while continuously developing my skills and career.

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for this position. I have hands-on experience in B2B lead generation, prospect list building, cold outreach, appointment setting, and lead closing. I have worked with multiple companies and clients where I was responsible for finding targeted prospects, conducting outreach campaigns, booking qualified appointments, and communicating with potential clients professionally.

I have worked with companies including Ray Advertising, Cloud Tech Services, Synthron Media, Boyshero, and Tutree Inc. Through these experiences, I developed strong skills in lead research, cold emailing, LinkedIn outreach, CRM management, appointment setting, and sales communication. I also gained valuable experience in lead closing and maintaining client relationships.

I am familiar with tools such as LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, Google Sheets, CRM platforms, and different outreach tools. I am a quick learner, detail-oriented, hardworking, and capable of working independently while meeting targets and deadlines.

I believe my experience and communication skills would make me a valuable addition to your team. I would appreciate the opportunity to discuss my qualifications further.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Sincerely,
Mohammad Rohan

job_applications.cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Manager,

I am excited to apply for the Sales & Growth Executive position at Dynime. With over eight years of experience in business development, sales, client relationship management, and customer success, I am confident that I can contribute to your team's growth and success.

Currently, I serve as Head of Business Development at Ecomgiantz, where I drive lead generation, client acquisition, and revenue growth for eCommerce solutions. I manage the full sales cycle, from identifying prospects and conducting outreach to presenting solutions, negotiating contracts, and closing deals. I have extensive experience working with international clients and understand the importance of building strong, long-term business relationships.

In addition, I am proficient in CRM and sales tools including HubSpot, Zoho CRM,slack,salesforce, and Zoho SalesIQ etc. My experience with email outreach, LinkedIn prospecting, customer support, and team collaboration has helped me consistently deliver results and exceed expectations. Throughout my career, I have demonstrated strong communication skills, problem-solving abilities, and a commitment to achieving business objectives.

I believe I am a great fit for this role because I combine sales expertise with a customer-focused mindset and a genuine passion for business growth. I am highly motivated, adaptable, and eager to contribute to Dynime's international expansion while continuing to grow professionally in a dynamic global environment.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how my experience and skills can contribute to Dynime's continued success.

Sincerely,

Shibani Biswas

Maliha Momtaz

job_applications.cover_letter: Through years of scouting, I have developed great communication skills and the ability of dealing with various kind of people calmly. My experience as a small business owner, has taught me that I like to communicate with customers and come up with solutions for their problems. Currently, I am looking for opportunities where I can learn and grow from a structured environment while also contributing consistently. As Dynime is a startup tech company, I will probably be able to learn how a startup company operates and how do they handle their international clients. Since, I am resilient while learning and always open to feedback, I believe, I will be a perfect candidate for this role.
